metadata.description: Automation-oriented compatibility data. Each Steam AppID can contain multiple tools under tools.* because RenoDX and Special K have different install/config needs.
metadata.trim_policy: Rows that only say the mod works and require no extra setup are omitted.

global_warnings: Disable AutoHDR and RTX HDR to avoid double tonemapping if the image is washed out.
On Linux, DLSS and RenoDX together with Wayland HDR can crash some games; gamescope or nightly ReShade may help.
renodx.install_summary: Install ReShade with full add-on support, then copy the .addon64 or .addon32 file to the folder where ReShade is installed.

global_warnings: Keep the game's brightness/contrast/gamma setting at default in most cases.
If XeSS crashes, update libxess.dll in the game folder.
If BT.709-limited even with saturation maxed, try upgrading R11G11B10_FLOAT.
If black screen on launch, switch Settings Mode from Simple to Advanced, upgrade R10G10B10A2_UNORM to Output Size, then restart.
If DLSS Frame Generation flickers or behaves oddly, use renodx-dlssfix.addon64 or an older 3.8.x DLSSG DLL.
In most UE5 games, sliders only apply after changing scene, loading a save, adjusting graphics settings, or returning to the main menu.
